title: Release 1.1.12 npm docs and launch notes
summary: Release 1.1.12 is the npm documentation and launch note patch. It adds an explicit Latest Release section to mcp/README.md so npm displays release notes, updates CHANGELOG.md for 1.1.11/1.1.12, and keeps the root README
body: Release 1.1.12 is the npm documentation and launch-note patch. It adds an explicit Latest Release section to mcp/README.md so npm displays release notes, updates CHANGELOG.md for 1.1.11/1.1.12, and keeps the root README hero on the animated demo GIF with clear website/viewer links.

context.fact: Release 1.1.12 is the npm documentation and launch-note patch.
context.why: npm needed explicit release notes and the root README needed launch-ready website/viewer links and demo positioning.
context.trigger: Recall when preparing npm package docs, changelog entries, or release communication around 1.1.12.
context.action: Keep mcp/README.md release notes, CHANGELOG.md entries, package metadata, and root README launch links aligned.
context.verification: Repo-local capture grounded to mcp/README.md, CHANGELOG.md, README.md, and mcp/package.json.
context.risk_if_forgotten: Agents may ship npm docs without visible release notes or accidentally diverge package metadata from launch messaging.
context.stale_when: A later release supersedes 1.1.12 launch notes or npm docs are reorganized.
